title: What is NUwave-guest?
plain_text: NUwave-guest provides access to the internet. Guest accounts are, by default, valid on up to 3 devices for 30 days. Once an account has expired, re-registration is required. Guests can register individually by following the instructions in NUwave-guest. Read the article How do I register for individual NUwave-guest access? for more information. They will then be provided a conference code or username and password by an event organizer using the instructions in FAQ: NUwave-guest access. Note: It is recommended that guests connect to eduroam for daily guest access. Refer to How do I connect to eduroam? to learn more about how to connect to this network. Limitations Accounts will remain active for 30 days. A registered account can be used with up to 3 personal devices. Locations You can connect to NUwave-guest on up to three devices by following the steps in NUwave-guest. Access is available in: Academic buildings. Administrative locations. Residential Halls. Help For assistance with NUwave-guest, call the IT Service Desk at 617.373.4357.
body_html:
NUwave-guest provides access to the internet. Guest accounts are, by default, valid on up to 3 devices for 30 days. Once an account has expired, re-registration is required. Guests can register individually by following the instructions in NUwave-guest. Read the article How do I register for individual NUwave-guest access? for more information. They will then be provided a conference code or username and password by an event organizer using the instructions in FAQ: NUwave-guest access.

Note: It is recommended that guests connect to eduroam for daily guest access. Refer to How do I connect to eduroam? to learn more about how to connect to this network.

Limitations

  • Accounts will remain active for 30 days.
  • A registered account can be used with up to 3 personal devices.

Locations

You can connect to NUwave-guest on up to three devices by following the steps in NUwave-guest. Access is available in:

  • Academic buildings.
  • Administrative locations.
  • Residential Halls.

Help

For assistance with NUwave-guest, call the IT Service Desk at 617.373.4357.
